PropertyId.description: The name of the evaluated property. Empty if result type is Equal or Exception.

InputItem.description: The value of the property on input as a string. Empty if result type is Equal or Exception.

ReturnedItem.description: The returned value of the property as a string. Empty if result type is Equal or Exception.

TimeStep.description: Time of the results creation as OADate

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
